negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_d4a6ebbf-041d-4228-8102-372d746e3870
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle, looking out onto a multi-lane road under a clear blue sky. The road is lined with utility poles and overhead power lines, and there are traffic lights visible at an intersection further down the road. Several vehicles are present: a black sedan directly ahead, a white sedan and a white van to the right. The road has a speed limit sign indicating "Speed Limit 40" with a warning about a curve ahead. Trees and shrubs are visible along the roadside, adding greenery to the scene. As the video progresses, the traffic lights remain green, nearby vehicles start moving forward, and the ego vehicle shifts to the right lane, capturing the dynamic motion of the road and the surrounding environment.
